summary: First-finish smoke test of TradeSense AI. All 14 backend endpoints and all 8 frontend pages tested. Backend returned 39 signals (2 delisted symbols expected). Buy dialog + Add-to-Portfolio flow verified end-to-end. Claude AI /analyze returned 827-char thesis. No console/page errors on frontend. Only observation: currently 0 signals at 4+ stars so High-Conviction tab is empty (data-driven, not a bug).
passed: GET /api/scan/status returns status+count (39 signals, scanning after POST)
GET /api/signals returns {signals:[...]} with all documented fields (symbol,name,sector,price,buy_zone,stop_loss,target_1,target_2,confidence,stars,strategy,horizon,scores,reasons)
GET /api/signals?min_stars=4 filter works (returns 0 currently, expected as no 4-star stocks)
POST /api/stock/RELIANCE.NS/analyze returns Claude Sonnet AI text (~827 chars)
GET /api/market/heatmap returns 13 sectors with stocks, avg_score, avg_return_1m
GET /api/news returns 20 items with sentiment+score and aggregate_score=62.2
Trades POST (with quantity+price payload), close (pnl=100, pnl_pct=3.57), DELETE all working
GET /api/portfolio returns summary with 12 keys + holdings[] with live prices
POST /api/scan/run triggers background scan (status transitions to scanning)
Frontend loads without errors (0 console/page errors)
All sidebar navs work: Dashboard, Signals, Portfolio, Watchlist, Heatmap, Journal, Performance, News
Signals page renders 39 signal cards with confidence bar, stars, buy zone, SL, targets, reasons chips, invest amount
Add-to-Portfolio dialog opens, confirm-buy-btn creates trade -> visible in Portfolio page with live CMP
Sidebar Run Scan button + scan status pill (ready/scanning) visible and updates

notes.trade_payload_contract: POST /api/trades requires {symbol, price, quantity, stop_loss, target_1, target_2, strategy} - not entry_price/shares. Frontend SignalCard already uses correct contract (verified via dialog test).
notes.high_conviction_empty: Current scan produced max 3-star signals, so /api/signals/high-conviction and 'High Conviction' tab show 0 - this is data-driven, not a defect.
